emails.subject: Swap database
emails.body: Swap database How long will it take for them to grant me access? Angela D. Davis Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith, Suite 3842 Houston, Texas 77002 Tele. (713) 345-8347 Fax: (713) 646-3393 e-mail: angela.davis@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Swap database
emails.body: Re: Swap database It make take a bit longer. The computer people will no longer do this for us, I am going to have to do this myself, and I don't know how. I've got to figure this out. Angela Davis@ENRON 02/15/2001 12:43 PM
